arts.ttl: Tottenham star is club’s number one target for summer – ‘Attracted to project’ and they have trump card
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Cuti Romero is Atletico Madrid’s number one transfer target for the summer transfer window. That’s according to AS, who say the Spanish side ‘will make an effort’ to get Romero out of Tottenham this summer but know negotiations will be difficult.
